calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue; Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of James A. Goodman And Alannah Price In Support Thereof; Request For 15,800.91 In Fees For Transfer Of Action
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Noriya Bragg, Esq., BLACKSTONE LAW, APC, 310.622.4278 nbragg@blackstonepc.com
Attorneys for Plaintiff, CRISTA FLENNER-ESPARZA
Hector E. Corea, Esq., EPSTEIN BECKER & GREEN, P.C. 310.556.8861 HCorea@ebglaw.com
Attorneys for Defendant FRAGOMEN, DEL REY, BERNSEN & LOEWY, LLP
Sheila Pham, CSR 13293 415-274-9977 calendar-la@veritex.com Court reporter

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS FRAGOMEN, DEL REY, and BERNSEN & LOEWY, LLP's Motion To Transfer Venue.

The court grants the motion to transfer but denies the requested award of attorneys' fees.

(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS)

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-02-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
